title: EssentialsD
description:
Useful datapack for small servers.
With this, you can use many plugin commands without any plugins, true vanilla
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f49165885d6915358a70b77f4b5a6de57ba988_0.webp)
# Functions:

- Homes
- Warps
- Permissions and groups system
- Player id system (you can see players id in tab)
- s, gm and other commands
- tpa
- rtp
- config
- en and ru languages
- regions
- cooldowns
- kits
- tps system

# Work in progress! Please report all bugs.
## Planned functions:

- menus
- anticheat
- api
- auth

### and more...
